name: Build NVIDIA
description: Registers Build NVIDIA / NVIDIA API Catalog models as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with authenticated model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Build NVIDIA API key used for model discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Build NVIDIA API key
settings.description: Build NVIDIA API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to NVIDIA_API_KEY.

providers.name: Build NVIDIA
providers.description: Discovers and runs NVIDIA-hosted API Catalog models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
